hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); if printf '%s' "$INPUT" | grep -qE '"command"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"git commit'; then set -o pipefail; { make fix_style && git diff --cached --name-only -z | xargs -0 -r git add -- && make check_style; } 2>&1 | grep -vE 'overriding recipe for target|ignoring old recipe for target'; else true; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Auto-fix + code quality (cs-fixer, rector, phpcs, phpmd, phpstan)...
